title: Library Membership
context: You have just moved to a new neighborhood and want to join the local library. Ask about membership, borrowing rules, and study facilities. Respond clearly and politely when the librarian asks for details.
user_role: A new resident who wants to register for a library card
agent_role: A librarian explaining membership and available services
opening_prompt: Hello, welcome to the community library. How can I help you today?
target_grammar: Present Simple for rules and schedules
